# Jack's Plastering Northern Beaches

> NSW Fair Trading licensed plastering and gyprocking trade business serving the Northern Beaches and Sydney-wide. Owner-operator Jack with 15+ years on the tools. Fixed-price written quotes within 24 hours, most jobs completed in a single visit, backed by a 2-year written workmanship guarantee.

Location: Dee Why, NSW 2099, Australia
Phone: (02) 5500 1608
Email: info@plasteringnorthernbeaches.com.au
Service area: Northern Beaches (Manly, Dee Why, Brookvale, Collaroy, Narrabeen, Mona Vale, Newport, Avalon, Palm Beach) and Sydney-wide (Lower North Shore, Upper North Shore, Hills)

## Services

- [Ceiling Repair Sydney](https://www.plasteringnorthernbeaches.com.au/services/ceiling-repair-sydney): Cracked, sagging or water-stained ceilings repaired in one visit. Fixed-price quote in 24 hours.
- [Water Damage Ceiling Repair](https://www.plasteringnorthernbeaches.com.au/services/water-damage-ceiling-repair): Brown stains, sagging plaster, and full ceiling restoration after leaks. Direct insurer liaison.
- [Plaster Hole Repair](https://www.plasteringnorthernbeaches.com.au/services/plaster-hole-patch): Fixed-price hole patching from $290. TV bracket damage, doorknob dents, DIY rescues.
- [Cornice Repair Sydney](https://www.plasteringnorthernbeaches.com.au/services/cornice-repair-sydney): Modern and heritage Federation cornice repair, replacement, and profile matching.
- [End of Lease Plaster Repair](https://www.plasteringnorthernbeaches.com.au/services/end-of-lease-plaster-repair): Multi-hole bundle pricing from $290. Paint-ready same day. GST invoice for property managers.
- [Storm Damage Ceiling Repair](https://www.plasteringnorthernbeaches.com.au/services/storm-damage-ceiling-repair): 1-hour emergency response across Sydney. Insurance documentation handled.

## Hub pages

- [Plasterer Northern Beaches](https://www.plasteringnorthernbeaches.com.au/plasterer-northern-beaches): Head-term service hub linking to every plastering service.
- [Homepage](https://www.plasteringnorthernbeaches.com.au/): Brand overview, services grid, recent work gallery, testimonials, FAQ.

## Key facts

- Owner-operator: Jack — NSW Fair Trading licensed plasterer
- Years of experience: 15+
- Guarantee: 2-year written workmanship guarantee, brand-backed
- Pricing model: fixed-price written quotes only — no hourly rates
- Quote turnaround: within 24 hours of enquiry
- Emergency response: 1-hour target on the Northern Beaches for active emergencies (sagging ceiling, active water leak, collapse risk)
- Standard job pricing: small plaster hole patches from $290, water-damage ceiling repairs $600-$2,500, full home plastering quoted per square metre at $25-$45/m²
- Insurance: works directly with homeowner insurers on water-damage and storm-damage claims
- Deposit policy: no deposit until materials arrive on site

## Frequently asked

The homepage and individual service pages carry detailed FAQ blocks covering plastering cost in Sydney, drying times, the difference between plastering / gyprocking / rendering, why ceilings crack, plastering over painted walls, NSW Fair Trading licensing requirements, and per-service pricing ranges. All answers are written for direct extraction with specific numbers, named entities, and Sydney-specific context.
